name: Singapore Sling
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the lemon juice, powdered sugar, and gin in a shaker filled with ice.
2. Shake well until chilled.
3. Strain the mixture into a collins glass filled with ice cubes.
4. Top off with an equal amount of club soda.
5. Gently float the cherry brandy on top of the drink.
6. Garnish with fresh fruit slices and serve with a straw.
